name: Homemade Slice & Bake Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut four 14-inch x 12-inch pieces of waxed paper or plastic wrap. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, cream butter or margarine with the sugar. Beat in vanilla and lemon extracts and eggs until light and fluffy.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour and baking soda. Stir flour mixture into egg and butter mixture; blend well.
4. Divide the dough into 4 pieces. Shape each piece into an 8-inch - 10-inch roll.
5. Wrap rolls in waxed paper. Place the rolls in a rectangular freezer container with a tight-fitting lid, or into a large freezer zip-lock bag, or wrap well in a piece of heavy-duty aluminum foil. Label with date and contents.
6. Store in freezer. Use within 6 months.
To prepare cookies:
1. Slightly thaw one roll of sugar cookie dough.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Cut the dough into 1/4-inch thick slices. Arrange cut pieces on lightly greased cookie sheets, placing about 1/2-inch apart.
4. Sprinkle with additional granulated sugar, if desired.
5. Bake for about 8-10 minutes, or until the edges just begin to brown.
6. Remove from oven and cool on wire racks.
Makes approximately 3 dozen cookies.
Makes 4 rolls of cookie dough, or enough for about 12 dozen cookies.
